text: Date of Initial Diagnosis: Record the date of the first clinical or pathologic diagnosis of the cancer being reported, regardless of where the diagnosis was made.
notes: Fixture: CoC half of the cross-family overlap pair on item 390 (paired with spcsm_2024:date_of_diagnosis; SEER should win precedence).

text: Laterality identifies the side of a paired organ on which the tumor originated. Code laterality for all sites listed in the paired-organ table; code 0 for all other sites.
notes: Fixture: newer half of the CoC-family recency pair on item 410 (supersedes fords_2016:laterality for cases diagnosed on or after 2023-10-01).
